productDisplayName: Red Tape Men Casual Light Brown Floater
description: Take casual dressing to the next level with these strappy sandals from red tape. The clean design coupled with high quality material makes this pair a great choice for everyday casual wear.  Team this with jeans and tees for a laid back look.Upper Strappy leather uppers over the forefoot and midfoot to give a snug Fit Velcro closures over the forefoot, midfoot and back of ankle for a snug fit Stitch detailing for added style and reinforcement Padded fabric lining for greater comfort Brand tab near the midfoot strap for style Midsole Padded suede footbed with elevated bumps for all-day comfort PU midsole for lightweight comfort Outsole Rubber outsole with leaf pattern seam and lugs on the side for greater grip shoe careWipe dust using a dry, clean clothDo not store in direct sunlight
